'''Nagraoao''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He often worked with [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Roark Garnet/Legends|Roark Garnet]].

==History==
Nagraoao was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He occasionally worked with his friend, the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Roark Garnet/Legends|Roark Garnet]]. During one mission, the pair crash-landed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], and Nagraoao was injured in the landing. The Wookiee was bleeding, and with no supplies—the [[Bacta tank/Legends|rejuvenation tank]] and medical supplies had been destroyed in the crash—Garnet suggested using his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] to cauterize the wound. Nagraoao complained about his plan.<ref name="RPG" />

At some point, Nagraoao accompanied Garnet on the flight in his [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], the ''[[Dorion Discus]]'', which he had recently repaired after being attacked by [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Unidentified pyramidal starship|pyramidal starships]] [[Standard day/Legends|days]] previously. The ''Dorion Discus'' encountered a [[Meteor shower/Legends|meteor storm]], and the freighter's [[Fusion generator/Legends|fusion generators]], which had not been properly repaired, gave out and the pair were lucky that the ship's [[magnetic bottle]] did not follow suit. Nagraoao employed his technical expertise in helping to repair the vessel; however, before they finished, more of the pyramidal ships arrived, causing a fluctuation in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="RPG" />

At a later time, Nagraoao and the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Hawk Carrow]] were [[Prison/Legends|incarcerated]] in the [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|Spice Mines of Kessel]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Learning of his friends' plight, Roark Garnet flew the ''[[Dorion Discus]]'' to the [[Kessel system/Legends|Kessel system]] to rescue them. He was stopped by a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] performing inspections, but the smuggler bribed the [[Unidentified Imperial officer (Kessel system)|Navy officer]] to let him go.<ref name="RPG" />

==Personality and traits==
Nagraoao was a faithful companion to Roark Garnet and was well trained in the maintenance and repairing of space [[Transport/Legends|transports]].<ref name="RPG" /> His name translated from [[Shyriiwook/Legends|Shyriiwook]] as "heroic kin."<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>
